summary: Sales Dashboard Fixes - ALL TESTS PASSED (9/9 backend + All frontend). Verified: Total Revenue ~AED 2,174,969, Sales by Course shows revenue (not 0), Monthly Revenue Trend shows 12 months with both deals and revenue, Monthly Leaderboard shows agents with actual revenue, Today's Transactions endpoint working, Import buttons removed from Sales CRM, Payment Gateway form opens without SelectItem error (fixed empty value to 'none'), Finance CLT Dashboard shows Total Receivables AED 2,174,969, Drill-down modals working, Lead Pipeline clickable and navigates to Sales CRM.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby warning in console (not a blocker)

passed_tests: Backend: test_dashboard_stats_total_revenue - Total Revenue AED 2,174,969 (902 deals)
Backend: test_sales_by_course_has_revenue - Revenue data returned, NOT 0
Backend: test_monthly_trend_has_multiple_months - 12 months of data with deals and revenue
Backend: test_leaderboard_has_revenue - Monthly Leaderboard shows agents with actual revenue
Backend: test_today_transactions_endpoint - Returns correct structure
Backend: test_sales_agent_closings_overall - Top 10 agents returned with closings and revenue
Backend: test_sales_agent_closings_this_month - Top 5 agents this month working
Backend: test_leads_endpoint_works - Sales CRM leads endpoint returns 200
Backend: test_finance_clt_receivables_total - Finance CLT shows receivables
Frontend: Sales Dashboard loads with Total Revenue AED 2,174,969
Frontend: Today's Transactions section visible (shows 0 deals today as expected)
Frontend: Top 10 Agents Overall chart displayed with clickable drill-down
Frontend: Top 5 Agents This Month chart displayed
Frontend: Monthly Revenue Trend chart shows 12 months (2026-01 to 2026-12)
Frontend: Sales by Course pie chart shows revenue distribution
Frontend: Monthly Leaderboard shows top 5 agents with actual revenue (Muhammed Shanif: AED 39,698)
Frontend: Lead Pipeline clickable - navigates to Sales CRM
Frontend: Drill-down modal for Top 10 Agents shows detailed table
Frontend: Drill-down modal for Leaderboard shows full 10 agents
Frontend: Sales CRM page - NO 'Import Historical Students' button
Frontend: Sales CRM page - NO 'Import Students XLSX' button
Frontend: Sales CRM page - NO 'Import Comprehensive Students' button
Frontend: Payment Gateway form opens without SelectItem console error
Frontend: Finance CLT Dashboard shows Total Receivables AED 2,174,969

total_revenue_display.details: Total Revenue shows AED 2,174,969 with 902 deals closed. Backend uses enrollment_amount field correctly.

sales_by_course_chart.details: Sales by Course pie chart shows actual revenue distribution: Basic Package, Offer Course, Others (37). Revenue NOT 0.

monthly_revenue_trend.details: Monthly Revenue Trend shows 12 months (2026-01 to 2026-12) with both Deals line and Revenue area. Backend uses enrolled_at field.

monthly_leaderboard.details: Monthly Leaderboard shows top 5 agents: Muhammed Shanif (4 deals, AED 39,698), Aleesha (7 deals, AED 25,021), etc. Revenue NOT 0.

today_transactions.details: Today's Transactions section displays correctly. Shows 0 deals/AED 0 today (no transactions yet today).

import_buttons_removed.details: Sales CRM page does NOT show Import Historical Students, Import Students XLSX, or Import Comprehensive Students buttons.

payment_gateway_form.details: Payment Gateway creation form opens without SelectItem console error. Settlement Day of Week defaults to 'none' (N/A) instead of empty string.

finance_clt_receivables.details: Finance CLT Dashboard shows Total Receivables AED 2,174,969, Total Payables AED 0, Net Balance AED 2,174,969.

dashboard_drill_downs.details: Clicking Top 10 Agents opens modal with detailed table. View All on Leaderboard opens full table. Lead Pipeline navigates to Sales CRM.

data_verified.sales_by_course: Basic Package, Offer Course, Others (37 courses)

seed_data_creation: Using existing data: 902 enrolled students, 899 LTV transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sales Dashboard fixes verified. Key endpoints: /api/dashboard/stats (uses enrollment_amount), /api/dashboard/sales-by-course (revenue not 0), /api/dashboard/monthly-trend (uses enrolled_at field), /api/dashboard/leaderboard (monthly period), /api/dashboard/today-transactions, /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings. Payment Gateway form fixed - settlement_day_of_week uses 'none' instead of empty string. Finance CLT shows receivables correctly. Import buttons removed from Sales CRM.
testing_method: Backend pytest (9 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification
